name: Spencer Moxley
title: Builder & Homelabber
bio: Someone who likes figuring out how things work — racking servers, writing code, and reading philosophy when the screens are off.
aboutLong: I have a habit of taking things apart to understand them. Most of my free time goes to my homelab — running services, breaking my own network, and learning infrastructure the hard way — and to writing code for projects that scratch a real itch. Outside of tech, philosophy keeps me asking why any of it matters: not just how to build something, but whether and why. I'm still early in all of it, which is the point — I'm here to keep learning out loud.
